name: The Overloaded IC
jobsToBeDone: Surface relevant context automatically when starting a task
Share mental models without a synchronous call
Find the canonical version of a decision from 6 months ago

thinkingStyle.cognitiveSpace: Maintains a mental map of who knows what across the org; anxious when that map feels stale or incomplete. Optimizes for reducing cognitive overhead.
emotionalReactions: Frustrated when searches return irrelevant noise
Relieved when context surfaces unprompted before a meeting
Skeptical of AI summaries that omit nuance
guidingPrinciples: I would rather ask a question than make a wrong assumption
Speed of retrieval matters more than perfect organization

name: The Sprint Planner
jobsToBeDone: Plan and communicate two-week sprints without losing track of cross-team dependencies
Retrospect on past sprints to improve team velocity predictably

thinkingStyle.cognitiveSpace: Thinks in terms of capacity, dependencies, and blockers; constantly managing multiple parallel threads at different stages of completion.
emotionalReactions: Anxious when blockers are invisible until the last minute
Satisfied when the team finishes a sprint with no carry-over
Frustrated by status updates that require manual aggregation
guidingPrinciples: Dependencies should be explicit, not implied
Retrospectives only improve things if action items have owners

name: The Async Worker
jobsToBeDone: Maintain deep focus despite asynchronous interruptions from collaborators in other timezones
Contribute meaningfully to team discussions without attending every synchronous meeting

thinkingStyle.cognitiveSpace: Operates in focused blocks; treats communication as work that must be scheduled, not reactive. Strong preference for written over verbal handoffs.
emotionalReactions: Relieved when decisions are documented before they need to be acted on
Guilty when slow async response times create bottlenecks for others
guidingPrinciples: Async-first is a feature, not a limitation
Written context is a gift to future-me and the team
Meetings should be a last resort, not a default
